c7_key_estimate.relation_note: coordinate blocks are linearly independent; no within-block kernel relations

relation_screen.interpretation: C7 removes the full projective dictionary as the main candidate. The standard-basis mode has no intra-block public mask relations and is the conservative ready baseline. screened_random is experimental and must pass relation screens before being used in claims. This estimator is a screening tool, not a cryptanalytic proof.
